CEO & Founder | Salesforce Architect at Forcecraver | Expert in Salesforce, DataCloud, Agentforce, SAP, Oracle, Full Stack Development, Data Science & Engineering | Transforming CRM & Tech Solutions

🚀 Hiring: Senior Data Scientist (#Forcecraver)
📍 Location: Remote (India Only)
💼 Experience: 5+ Years
📄 Employment Type: Contract


We are looking for a Senior Data Scientist to lead validation, optimization, and production deployment of ML models for premium freight pricing. This is a high-impact, revenue-critical role requiring strong expertise in ML, MLOps, and production systems.

🔹 Key Responsibilities:
✔ Audit & validate ML models (data leakage, evaluation rigor)
✔ Benchmark performance & perform error analysis
✔ Recommend GO/NO-GO for production readiness
✔ Optimize models (feature engineering, tuning, retraining)
✔ Define monitoring (drift detection, alerts, retraining triggers)
✔ Collaborate with data & engineering teams
✔ Lead production deployment & post-launch monitoring
✔ Mentor team & drive ML best practices

🔹 Required Skills:
✔ Strong ML expertise (regression, forecasting, clustering)
✔ Python (scikit-learn, pandas, NumPy, TensorFlow/PyTorch/XGBoost)
✔ MLOps, model deployment & monitoring
✔ Cloud ML platforms (AWS SageMaker / Azure ML / Vertex AI)
✔ SQL, data pipelines, Spark/Databricks/Snowflake
✔ Strong statistics & optimization background

🔹 Good to Have:
✔ Experience in logistics / freight pricing / supply chain
✔ Pricing optimization or revenue management models

🎓 Qualification: Master’s / PhD in relevant field
📌 Candidates must be based in India

📩 Please reach out to me at +919899634637 or jbhatia@forcecraver.com to discuss further.
🔔 Follow @Jitender Bhatia @Forcecraver Technologies for more job updates.

[EMAILS FOUND: jbhatia@forcecraver.com]
